payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Portrait-oriented rectangular light-wood frame with a cream/beige mat holding a printed certificate (blue text and small emblem); glass-covered with a faint glare, corners intact and the framed document appears fully visible — photographed from approximately 1.0 m away.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"light wooden rectangular certificate frame","long_description":"Portrait-oriented rectangular light-wood frame with a cream/beige mat holding a printed certificate (blue text and small emblem); glass-covered with a faint glare, corners intact and the framed document appears fully visible — photographed from approximately 1.0 m away.","attributes":["rectangular","light wood frame","cream/beige mat","printed certificate","blue text","small emblem/logo","glass-covered","portrait orientation","faint glare","intact condition"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
